description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden bookcase with a rustic, plank-style construction. The front features two wide horizontal shelves, including the base, providing ample space for storing or displaying books and other items. The sides and back are composed of vertically aligned wooden planks, giving the piece a sturdy and robust appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with natural knots and variations in color, enhancing its rustic charm. The base is broad and flat, ensuring stability when placed on the ground. There are no visible doors, drawers, or decorative elements, emphasizing a simple and functional design.
description: A tall, rustic wooden bookcase with two wide shelves and visible plank construction, designed for sturdy floor-standing use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and the plank-style construction of the sides and base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the vertical wooden planks and the solid, uninterrupted side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without open shelving, showing the full vertical plank back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with vertical wooden planks and no openings.
